metrics.name: MemoryUpgradeFacts [GEval]
metrics.reason: The response correctly mentions two SODIMM slots and dual-channel support, as well as supported configurations of 16 GB and 32 GB. However, it lacks the specification of DDR5-5600 memory at 1.1 V and does not explicitly state that the memory is customer accessible or upgradeable.

cases.answer_preview: The OMEN 17.3 inch Gaming Laptop PC supports a maximum RAM capacity of 32 GB, using two SODIMM slots with dual-channel support. The type of RAM it supports is DDR5-5600. You can install configurations of either 16 GB (8 GB x 2) or 32 GB (16 GB x 2) (OMEN 17.3 inch Gaming Laptop PC, page 8).

Printheads are specific to printers, and the manuals do not document any procedures related to printhead replacement for laptops.
